div.p: ML Pipeline v1.0 | Forward ➜ Loss ➜ Zero Grad ➜ Backward ➜ Step

ul.li: Batch Constraints: ${X} \in \mathbb{R}^{B \times I}$ where ${B}$ is batch size (stride-aligned).
Gradient Reset: optimizer.zero_grad() must precede backward() call to avoid gradient accumulation.
Memory Persistence: The Value objects maintain back-references to nodes until the graph is freed.

g.title: Main orchestrator for epoch/batch iterations. Controls the GIL and execution flow.
Stochastic Gradient Descent. State: Momentum buffers (64-bit floats).
The differentiable leaf node of the Autograd graph.
